creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
I built telegram-desktop 1.2.17_1 successfully using synth 2.05 on freebsd 11.2-STABLE. Your problem can caused by either
1. Older FreeBSD (difference between 11.1 and 11.2)
2. ccache
The telegram-desktop 1.3.12 port is coming, so you may try that. On the other hand, you can try on a newer freebsd release, like 11.2, or build without ccache.
